summary.headline: ADM announces departure of Senior Vice President and President, Asia Pacific, Joseph D. Taets.
summary.narrative_summary: Archer-Daniels-Midland Company announced that Joseph D. Taets, Senior Vice President and President, Asia Pacific, ceased to be an executive officer of the company as of February 3, 2022. Taets remains a member of senior management and the Executive Council, with no changes to his title, compensation, or other arrangements.

leadership_changes.name: Joseph D. Taets
leadership_changes.role: Senior Vice President and President, Asia Pacific

extraction_notes: The filing only contains information about the departure of an officer and does not include any earnings, financial guidance, or other financial details.
